project1.title: Modern Villa Almadies - Complete System
project1.description: Complete installation including security system with 12 4K IP cameras, full home automation (lighting, air conditioning, shutters), 8kWc solar installation with batteries, and premium finishes (marble, solid wood flooring). A flagship project demonstrating our expertise across all our fields.

project2.title: Villa Saly - Home Automation & Luxury Finishes
project2.description: Complete transformation of a villa into a smart residence. Home automation with voice control, scripted lighting, high-end finishes with Italian marble, premium fitted kitchen and luxurious bathrooms. Modern and elegant design.

project3.title: Villa Ngor - Autonomous Solar Installation
project3.description: 10kWc hybrid solar system with 20kWh lithium batteries allowing total autonomy. Consumption optimization with intelligent energy management. 95% reduction in electricity bill.

project4.title: Premium Apartment Plateau
project4.description: 4-room apartment transformed into a smart home. Complete home automation, security with cameras and smart alarm, contemporary finishes. Total control via smartphone and voice assistants.

project5.title: Penthouse Mermoz - Premium Finishes
project5.description: Complete renovation with ultra-luxury finishes: Carrara white marble, solid oak flooring, custom Italian kitchen, fitted dressing room, bathrooms with high-end equipment (island bathtub, hammam shower).

project6.title: Tech Solutions Offices - Professional Home Automation
project6.description: Modern workspace for 50 employees. Office automation (automatic lighting, zoned air conditioning), advanced security (biometric access control, AI video surveillance), connected meeting room.

project7.title: VDN Building - Security & Solar
project7.description: 5-story office building. 25kWc solar installation for common areas, 32-camera video surveillance system with AI, centralized access control, smart parking.

project8.title: Sea Plaza Shopping Center - Global Security
project8.description: Major shopping center security project. 80 IP cameras with facial recognition, fire and intrusion alarm, multi-zone access control, 24/7 remote monitoring, police integration.

project9.title: Le Prestige Restaurant - Automation & Ambiance
project9.description: Custom ambiance creation for gourmet restaurant. RGB scripted lighting, ambient music control, air conditioning management, complete automation. Control tablets for staff.

smartHome.title: Quatre good reasons to make your home smart

energy.title: Improve your energy performance
energy.description: Automate your blinds and shutters according to the weather.
details: In summer, when indoor temperature exceeds 25°C, your blinds automatically lower to protect your furniture, pets and plants while keeping your home cooler.
In winter, blinds open when the sun is out to let heat in, and close to retain warmth.

centralize.description: Control all your equipment from one app.
details: Manage heating, blinds, lights and alarms from your smartphone.
Create personalised scenarios to automate your daily life.

remote.description: Stay connected to your home from anywhere.
details: Control your home from anywhere in the world.
Receive real-time notifications about your home's status.

security.description: Secure your home with intelligent solutions.
details: Receive alerts in case of intrusion or anomaly.

smartHome.title: 4 Good Reasons to Make Your Home Smart

items.question: How to add new devices in the TaHoma® app?
items.answer: To add a new device, open the TaHoma® app, click 'Add Device', select the device type, and follow the instructions to connect it to your Wi-Fi network and integrate it into your home automation system.

items.question: How to add a voice assistant in the TaHoma® app?
items.answer: In the TaHoma® app, go to settings, select 'Voice Assistants', then choose the desired assistant (Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant…). Follow the steps to link your account and enable voice control for your devices.

items.question: How to choose the right automation hub?
items.answer: The choice depends on the number of devices you want to manage, the protocol type (Zigbee, RTS, Z-Wave), and the desired features (scenes, alerts, remote control). Our experts can guide you to select the right hub for your home.

items.question: How do I know if my device is compatible with your smart solutions?
items.answer: All compatible devices are listed in the TaHoma® app or on our website. Check the compatibility logos (RTS, Somfy, Zigbee, etc.) or contact support for confirmation.

items.question: Connected devices: Somfy checklist
items.answer:
• Automation hub installed and connected.
• Motion, opening, or temperature sensors correctly positioned.
• Commands and scenes configured to automate your home.
• Mobile apps installed on your devices for remote control.
• Check compatibility of each new device before adding.

items.question: Is my data secure with TaHoma® switch?
items.answer: Yes. TaHoma® uses a secure protocol to protect your personal data and device information. Communications are encrypted and servers comply with European security standards.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for a connected and secure home

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 20XX, our company was born from a passion to make technology accessible to everyone. We believe every home deserves to be smart, secure, and energy-efficient.
story.paragraph2: Over the years, we have developed unique expertise in integrating electronic security solutions, home automation, and solar energy. Our team of qualified experts works every day to transform your living spaces into connected and sustainable environments.
story.paragraph3: Today, we are proud to be the leader in Senegal in the smart home field, with over 500 completed projects and 98% client satisfaction.
